summary: Comprehensive testing of Recruitment Analytics Dashboard completed. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified login, dashboard, hierarchical panels, data table modals, upload modal, and logout functionality. All core features working correctly.

issues: Missing data-testid attribute on X close button (has it on Data Table Modal but not Upload Modal)

backend: API health check - returns healthy status
Auth check with valid cookie - returns authenticated
Upload Naukri CSV - processes 10 records correctly
Upload Pipeline CSV - processes 7 records correctly
UPSERT logic - re-upload updates instead of duplicating
Dashboard counts structure - all 9 fields present
Dashboard counts values - correct after uploads (total=10, registered=7, unregistered=3, shortlisted=6, rejected=2, scheduled=5, not_scheduled=1, attended=3, not_attended=2)
All drill-down endpoints return 401 without auth
frontend: Login page loads with all form elements
Login with admin/admin redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows correct summary cards (Total Applies: 10, Registered: 7, Unregistered: 3)
Expanding Registered shows Shortlisted (6) and Rejected (2) sub-panels
Expanding Shortlisted shows Scheduled (5) and Not Scheduled (1) sub-panels
Expanding Scheduled shows Attended (3) and Not Attended (2) sub-panels
Clicking panel opens data table modal with correct data
Data table modal shows correct columns and pagination
Data table modal X button closes modal
Upload Datasets button opens upload modal
Upload modal shows both sections (Naukri and Pipeline)
Upload modal X button closes modal
Logout button redirects to login page

action_items: MINOR: Add data-testid attribute to Upload Modal X close button for consistency with Data Table Modal
seed_data_creation: Test data uploaded via /app/test_data/naukri_test.csv (10 records) and /app/test_data/pipeline_test.csv (7 records)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs and frontend features are working correctly. Test data has been uploaded and dashboard shows correct counts. The UPSERT logic works - re-uploading same data updates records instead of creating duplicates. Cookie-based JWT auth is working properly. The hierarchical drill-down panels expand correctly showing the recruitment funnel: Unregistered (3) -> Registered (7) -> Shortlisted (6) / Rejected (2) -> Scheduled (5) / Not Scheduled (1) -> Attended (3) / Not Attended (2).
